text.title: Codemod-First Refactor Agent Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: sed -i mangled string literals containing the rename target; production typos.
antipattern.fix: Switch to AST tool (jscodeshift / ts-morph / ast-grep); rerun.

antipattern.symptom: Agent ran codemod + opened + merged PR. Subtle bug shipped.
antipattern.fix: Mandate distinct reviewer agent; transform-author cannot merge.

antipattern.symptom: Codemod produced compiling code; behaviour subtly broken.
antipattern.fix: Run focused test slice after each batch; fail on regression.
